name: Ron Weasley
key_facts: Youngest of six Weasley brothers, has one younger sister Ginny
Grew up at The Burrow in Ottery St Catchpole, Devon
Always received hand-me-down robes, books, and wands — a deep source of embarrassment
Gifted wizard chess player — sacrificed himself as a chess piece to help Harry reach the Philosopher's Stone
His boggart is a giant spider — he has severe arachnophobia
Became Gryffindor Keeper in fifth year after a rocky start
Wore a Horcrux locket that amplified his worst insecurities, causing him to temporarily abandon Harry and Hermione
Returned and destroyed the Horcrux locket using the Sword of Gryffindor
Witnessed his brother Fred's death in the Battle of Hogwarts
Married Hermione Granger after the war, has two children Rose and Hugo
Later co-managed Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes with George
Wand: Willow wood, unicorn hair core, 14 inches

relationships.Harry Potter: Best friend from their very first train ride to Hogwarts. Unwavering loyalty despite occasional jealousy.
relationships.Hermione Granger: Best friend, later romantic partner and wife. Years of bickering masking deep affection.
relationships.Ginny Weasley: Younger sister. Protective but eventually accepts her relationship with Harry.
relationships.Fred Weasley: Twin brother with George. Fred's death in the Battle of Hogwarts devastates Ron.
relationships.George Weasley: Twin brother. One of Ron's closest sources of humour and warmth.
relationships.Draco Malfoy: Mutual and intense dislike. Malfoy frequently mocked the Weasleys' poverty.
relationships.Lavender Brown: Brief girlfriend in sixth year which made Hermione jealous.

arc_by_book.Philosopher's Stone: Befriends Harry on the Hogwarts Express. Sacrifices himself in the chess match to let Harry reach the Stone.
arc_by_book.Chamber of Secrets: Broken wand causes chaos. Helps Harry discover the Chamber, vomits slugs after a botched curse.
arc_by_book.Prisoner of Azkaban: Scabbers revealed to be Peter Pettigrew. Ron's leg is broken protecting Harry from Sirius.
arc_by_book.Goblet of Fire: Jealous of Harry's Triwizard fame, temporarily estranged, reconciles before the final task.
arc_by_book.Order of the Phoenix: Becomes Prefect surprisingly, fights at the Department of Mysteries.
arc_by_book.Half-Blood Prince: Starts as Keeper, suffers through Lavender Brown relationship, nearly killed by poisoned mead.
arc_by_book.Deathly Hallows: Abandons the Horcrux hunt under the locket's influence, returns to save Harry's life, fights in the Battle of Hogwarts.
